features.name: DPI import function with open unpacked array parameter
features.description: Code should include a DPI imported function whose formal parameter is an open (unsized) unpacked array, triggering Verilator's DPI task lowering pass to process a port with no range bounds

features.name: open unsized unpacked byte array declaration
features.description: Code should include an open (unsized) unpacked array variable declaration using byte unsigned element type with no dimension bounds specified

features.name: DPI import function call with open array argument in always block
features.description: Code should include a call to a DPI imported function passing an open unpacked array variable as an argument from within an always procedural block
